articles.title: Midnight Thoughts
articles.content:
The stars are quiet tonight,
Whispering secrets to the moon.
I sit alone with my notebook,
Hoping morning doesn't come too soon.

Shadows dance upon the walls,
A silent ballet in the dark.
Every breath a fragile melody,
Leaving an invisible mark.

articles.title: Concrete Dreams
articles.content:
Yeah, waking up to the sirens, city never sleeps,
Walking through the neon, making promises to keep.
Hustle in my veins, gotta elevate the name,
Not doing it for clout, man, I'm dodging all the fame.

Type the words, hit record, let the beat drop,
Started from the bottom now we heading to the top.
Every single verse is a piece of my soul,
Putting pieces together just to make myself whole.

articles.title: Ocean's Edge
articles.content:
Waves crashing down,
Erasing the footprints we left behind.
The tide pulls away,
Taking fragments of my restless mind.

Salt in the air, a cold, biting breeze,
Finding comfort in the chaotic seas.
